prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You’ve got this! Remember, starting is always the hardest part, but once you take that first step, you’ll build momentum. You’re stronger and more capable than you think. Don’t aim for perfect—just aim for progress. Every bit you do now is one less thing to worry about later. Take a deep breath, trust yourself, and dive in. Future you will thank you!
